page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6a.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 7H12 processors operating at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The x86_64 architecture configuration provides 128 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and cloud services.

With its high core density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.g6a.32xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale enterprise workloads that demand consistent compute performance without resource contention. The balanced resource profile makes it suitable for multi-threaded applications, large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, and general-purpose workloads requiring substantial parallel processing capabilities.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6a.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by AMD EPYC 7H12 processors at 2.6 GHz, the x86_64 architecture provides 128 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources. The instance maintains a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. This configuration is designed for enterprise workloads, multi-threaded applications, and large-scale web serving that require consistent performance and high parallel processing capabilities without resource contention.
